title: FROG Canonical Source Schema
description:
Conservative machine-checkable structural schema for canonical .frog source in FROG v0.1. This artifact covers top-level canonical source shape, allowed top-level section vocabulary, required-versus-optional top-level sections, and selected section-local structural ownership where the published Expression/ specification makes that ownership explicit and stable enough to encode.
It does not define full semantic validity, validated meaning, Execution IR, lowering, backend contract content, runtime realization, class-side widget member legality, or profile-gated execution legality.
$comment:
Normative ownership remains in Expression/ prose.
This schema is a repository-visible machine-checkable aid for structural reproducibility and must not be treated as the owner of the language.

spec_version.description:
Specification version identifier for the canonical source file.
In repository state v0.1, canonical source is expected to declare version 0.1.

metadataSection.description:
Required metadata section.
Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Metadata.md.

interfaceSection.description:
Required interface section.
Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Interface.md.

diagramSection.description:
Required diagram section.
Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Diagram.md.

connectorSection.description:
Optional connector section.
Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Connector.md.

frontPanelSection.description:
Optional front_panel section.
This schema conservatively captures explicit published front-panel structure: front_panel is an object, canvas is an object when present, widgets is an array when present, and ui_libraries is an array when present. Widget instance legality, class compatibility, member legality, and semantic behavior remain owned by Expression/Front panel.md, Expression/Widget.md, Expression/Widget class contract.md, Expression/Widget interaction.md, and later validation layers.

frontPanelCanvas.description: Optional design-time panel or coordinate-space metadata. The detailed semantic interpretation of canvas fields remains prose-owned by Expression/Front panel.md.

widgetInstance.description: Conservative structural schema for a widget instance serialized in front_panel.widgets or recursively in widget children. This schema captures only stable source shape, not class legality, role compatibility, value-type legality, containment legality, or class-side member legality.

value_type.description: Canonical FROG type expression for value-carrying widgets. Structural string acceptance here does not replace Type.md validation.

props.description: Source-owned widget property object. Property legality and ownership boundaries remain outside this schema.

parts.description: Source-visible widget parts object. Part existence, part cardinality, and part-member legality remain outside this schema.

children.description: Recursive child widget instances for container widgets. Container legality remains outside this schema.

widgetLayout.description: Conservative structural schema for widget design-time layout metadata. Field semantics remain prose-owned by Expression/Front panel.md.

iconSection.description:
Optional icon section.
Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Icon.md.

ideSection.description:
Optional ide section.
Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/IDE preferences.md.

cacheSection.description:
Optional cache section.
Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Cache.md.
